content.en:
The innate origin of the Origin Gate of the Purple Light World is not very large, but it is not careful, it is equivalent to the size of a big world before.

In addition to the terrifying purple light erosion of the Innate Origin Land, there are only threats from various purple light creatures, most of which come from the Purple Spirit Golden Worm of the Innate Origin Land.

However, the number of Purple Spirit Gold Worms was not much, and most of the Purple Spirit Gold Worms had rushed out of the Innate Origin Territory and were killed in the Purple Light World.

Therefore, the remaining Purple Spirit Golden Worms are not a big threat.

The real chance is the various innate origin objects of the innate origin land, which can increase the potential of the physical body, refine the soul, and make the soul transform.

Once you enter the Innate Origin Pool, you can use the Innate Origin Pool to reshape your body and soul and complete a life evolution.

In the chaos, most of the lives below the Heavenly Mandate realm are below the seventh-order life, and the best can reach the seventh- and eighth-order life level.

For example, Ye Tian is now also an eighth-order life, and this is still a life evolution completed with the help of the Void Heaven Dao Body.

But the eighth-order life level is not the limit, and there are also ninth-order lifeforms.

However, ninth-order lifeforms cannot be cultivated, even the Void Heaven Dao Body and Xuanxuan Void Technique cannot create ninth-order lifeforms, nor can they have any life-level exercises that have been cultivated to become ninth-order lifeforms.

In the midst of chaos, ninth-order lifeforms are only innate.

However, once most ninth-order lifeforms are born, they are born in the Heavenly Mandate Realm, resulting in almost no ninth-order life-level divine generals.

However, the Innate Origin Pool can change his life against the sky, so that the gods can reshape their bodies and create a ninth-order life level.

Of course, the attraction of the Innate Origin Pool to Heavenly Monarchs is also unimaginable, because many Heavenly Monarchs are still at the eighth order life level, and it is difficult to break the shackles and be promoted to the ninth order life level.

The news of the Innate Origin Pool made countless Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs go crazy, and they bought a large number of Zilin clothes and other items at all costs to prepare for entering the Innate Origin Place.

But soon, another piece of news came, using the Innate Origin Pool to reshape the physical body was dangerous, very dangerous, and it was almost lifeless.

Because this innate origin pool is different from the normal innate origin pool, it contains terrifying purple light energy, which is better for the transformation of the physical body to a certain extent, but if it can't withstand the erosion of purple light energy, the physical body will not only not be able to complete the transformation, but will collapse.

Except for one Heavenly Monarch who created a ninth-order life level, the other Heavenly Monarchs fell one by one in the Innate Origin Pool, and even the Heavenly Monarch List Heavenly Monarch fell by dozens of them.

How powerful the Heavenly Monarch is on the Heavenly Monarch List, they are all geniuses and powerhouses in the chaos, and they are all real Tianjiao in the Dao Ancestor forces, and each of them is expected to become the existence of the True Ancestor.

But now, they have fallen.

For a moment, many people hesitated, not daring to rashly enter the Innate Origin Pool.

However, there are still many people who are willing to enter the Innate Origin Realm, even if they don't enter the Innate Origin Pool, they can still collect other resources!

In short, the Innate Origin Land is still a land of great opportunity, and it is worth taking risks for everyone.

......

Ye Tian bought ten pieces of purple lin clothes and came to the purple light world, preparing to enter the innate origin land.

Although some Heavenly Monarchs fell in the Innate Origin Pool, few Heavenly Monarchs who really belonged to the Dao Ancestor forces died.

For example, Peng Yu Tianjun and the others did not go to die, because the Dao Ancestor forces knew very well the meaning of the Innate Origin Pool, and only some Heavenly Monarchs among the True Ancestor Forces did not understand anything and were not prepared, so they tried in vain to use the Innate Origin Pool to evolve the life level, and thus fell there.

And the only Heavenly Monarch who had successfully transformed and advanced to the ninth-order life level was a Heavenly Monarch of the Dao Ancestor forces.

Ye Tian, as the Daozi of the Void Heaven lineage, was also quickly told the secret of the Innate Origin Pool.

"Many Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals probably don't know that the Innate Origin Pool only gives hope for advancing to the ninth-order life level, and if you really want to completely transform, you still need a supreme physical body secret method, and only the kind of secret method created by the Dao Ancestor can you be sure to transform your physical body. If there was no such supreme body secret method, even if he could guarantee his life, he would not be able to advance to the ninth-order life level. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He has this supreme physical body secret method on his body, that is, the Void Heaven Dao Body.

With the Void Heaven Dao Body, he doesn't need other secret methods, and he can completely use the Innate Origin Pool to advance the life level to the ninth order, but the premise is that he must resist the erosion of the purple light energy in the Innate Origin Pool.

The ancestor-level forces of all avenues have certain ways to resist the erosion of purple light, but the price is too high, and they can't exchange those treasures without a certain number of points, and Zilinyi can't do it at all, because Zilinyi is blocking purple light energy, but if you absorb the energy of the innate origin pool, then you must absorb purple light energy.

The purple light energy that entered the body eroded the flesh, and Zi Linyi had no way to expel it.

It was precisely because of this problem that those Dao ancestor-level power gods and heavenly monarchs did not dare to rashly enter the innate origin pool, so they could only wait for the opportunity.

But the energy of the Innate Origin Pool is not endless, at most dozens of people are allowed to use the Innate Origin Pool to advance to the ninth order of life, once the energy of the Innate Origin Pool is exhausted, it is equivalent to losing this great creation.

Ye Tian knew very well that he didn't have much advantage compared to those Heavenly Monarchs, if those Heavenly Monarchs thought of a way to resist the purple light energy, then the Innate Origin Pool would have no part in him.

Therefore, he had to enter the Innate Origin Pool first.

And he also has a great advantage, that is, he has the purple light talent and the purple armor talent.

Moreover, his purple light talent and purple armor talent far surpassed the talents of other purple spirit gold worms, because he copied the talents of countless purple beetles and integrated them into his body one by one, although he could not advance to the super god level, he was still much stronger than before.

Purple light talent and purple armor talent, this is Ye Tian's real hole card.

----------

In the depths of the purple light world, a purple portal is suspended here.

Ye Tian came here, saw this purple gate, dressed in a purple robe, and entered it without hesitation.

Wow!

Passing through the purple gate, Ye Tian entered the Innate Origin Place.

Rumble!!!!

The rich purple light eroded in, making Ye Tian frown deeply.

Compared to the purple light world, the purple light ability here is several times richer, and if it were not for the help of the purple linyi, the Heavenly Monarch would not be able to hold on to a few breaths.

"It's such a terrifying purple light energy, I'm afraid that the purple light energy of the Innate Origin Pool is even more terrifying, and the Heavenly Monarchs can't hold on to a breath, no wonder so many people have died in the Innate Origin Pool!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and soon came to the side of the Innate Origin Pool.
